seoTitle: Oberina vs Obum Obum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oberina and Obum Obum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oberina vs Obum Obum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oberina and Obum Obum.
heading: Oberina vs Obum Obum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oberina, Queensland and Obum Obum, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Obum Obum has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Oberina (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oberina or Obum Obum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oberina has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Obum Obum scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oberina scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Obum Obum scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oberina or Obum Obum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Obum Obum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
